scripts.build:so: bun submodule && $ANDROID_HOME/ndk/28.2.13676358/ndk-build NDK_PROJECT_PATH=android APP_BUILD_SCRIPT=android/jni/Android.mk NDK_APPLICATION_MK=android/jni/Application.mk NDK_LIBS_OUT=android/lib && ./scripts/prune-host-stl.sh android/lib
scripts.build:ios-debug: cd Example/testHotUpdate && bun && detox build --configuration ios.sim.debug
scripts.build:ios-release: cd Example/testHotUpdate && bun && detox build --configuration ios.sim.release
scripts.test:ios-debug: cd Example/testHotUpdate && E2E_PLATFORM=ios detox test --configuration ios.sim.debug
scripts.test:ios-release: cd Example/testHotUpdate && E2E_PLATFORM=ios bun detox test --configuration ios.sim.release
scripts.build:android-debug: cd Example/testHotUpdate && bun && detox build --configuration android.emu.debug
scripts.build:android-release: cd Example/testHotUpdate && bun && detox build --configuration android.emu.release
scripts.test:android-release: cd Example/testHotUpdate && E2E_PLATFORM=android bun detox test --configuration android.emu.release --headless --record-logs all
scripts.test:android-debug: cd Example/testHotUpdate && E2E_PLATFORM=android detox test --configuration android.emu.debug --headless --record-logs all
scripts.tests:packager:jet-ci: cd Example/testHotUpdate && cross-env TMPDIR=$HOME/.metro REACT_DEBUGGER="echo nope" node_modules/.bin/react-native start --no-interactive
